name: glassbox-mech-interp
summary: Mechanistic interpretability + EU AI Act Annex IV compliance. 21/21 frameworks: ACDC edge-circuit discovery, multi-arch GQA/RMSNorm adapter (Llama-3/Mistral/Phi-3), cross-model comparison, causal scrubbing, DAS, Hessian bounds, BH FDR, folded LayerNorm, SAE polysemanticity, multi-corruption, held-out validation. Dual-licensed (MIT core + BSL 1.1 compliance engine).
